text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 13:59 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

DISTINCT FUTURE SCOPE, NOT PART OF THE VALIDATED FIRST SLICE. Clustered multipart and conditional/versioned writes, erasure-coded transfer/reconstruction, dynamic membership and certificate lifecycle, durable healing/rebalance/orphan cleanup, and broader partition behavior remain planned or unvalidated. Single-node features and PA-6 planning models do not upgrade these cluster capabilities.
C3 Component: Future Cluster Capabilities — Planned / Not Implemented
